response.justification: Bogdan has 17+ years of broad software engineering experience and checks the minimum tenure requirement, but the role demands a director-level AI strategist with recognized expertise in AI products and platforms, cloud architecture leadership, and a track record of advising strategic customers at scale. His AI exposure is shallow and recent — limited to MCP tooling and agentic workflow infrastructure in his current role — and there is no evidence of strategic advisory work, executive-level influence, or deep cloud platform experience. His entrepreneurial and community-teaching background is a genuine positive signal, but it is insufficient to offset the large gap in AI depth and strategic seniority.
strengths: 17+ years of diverse software engineering experience spanning embedded systems, high-throughput microservices, GIS platforms, and full-stack product work
Hands-on AI-adjacent infrastructure work at re:cinq, including MCP code generators and agentic workflow frameworks, showing early adoption orientation
Demonstrated entrepreneurial drive as founder of GISCollective and a consistent track record of public knowledge-sharing through talks and workshops
concerns: No advanced degree in AI or a related technical field; holds a CS BS and a Fine Arts degree, both below the preferred PhD/Master's threshold for this role
AI expertise is recent and narrow — no demonstrated AI products or platforms at scale, and no recognized thought leadership in the AI/ML space
No evidence of director-level scope: no team leadership, no strategic customer advisory work, and no experience shaping technical roadmaps at an organizational level

key_factors.factor: Insufficient AI expertise depth and recognition
No director-level strategic or advisory experience
